channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saints' Derek Carr's season in jeopardy due to new shoulder injury: report
item.description: The New Orleans Saints' NFL Draft board may have to be revamped because Derek Carr' reportedly could miss the season with a shoulder injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas man suing Titans cornerback L'Jarius Sneed over December shooting at car lot
item.description: A Texas man who says Titans cornerback L’Jarius Sneed or his personal assistant shot at him while he was sitting inside a Mercedes-Benz in December is suing Sneed for at least $1 million.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rory McIlroy catches fire, shoots 66 to get back into contention at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Rory McIlroy’s fragile mental state got a big boost when he left Augusta National on Thursday night, shortly after a pair of late double bogeys had cast a pall on an otherwise brilliant round, in time to put his 4-year-old daughter, Poppy, to bed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Wickens returns to elite racing with use of hand controls 7 years after he was paralyzed in a crash
item.description: LONG BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Nearly seven years after he was paralyzed in an IndyCar crash, Robert Wickens will return to elite competition on Saturday when he drives a Corvette in the IMSA sports car race on the downtown streets of Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On a heater: McCarty's 8 birdies in 12-hole span leaves Masters rookie in the mix entering weekend
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — When PGA Tour rookie Matt McCarty knocked his tee shot on the 180-yard, par-3 sixth hole at the Masters to within 8 feet to set up his first birdie and then sank a bending 28-foot putt for another on the par-4 seventh, his mother knew exactly what was coming next.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick does not mention Robert Kraft in new book: report
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick's new book, which is set to be released next month, reportedly has one glaring omission: mention of his boss of 24 years, Patriots owner Robert Kraft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Paige Bueckers is projected to go No. 1 in WNBA draft to Dallas Wings
item.description: The WNBA is set to welcome its new rookie class, headlined by Paige Bueckers when the league holds its annual draft Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump admin to investigate USA Fencing incident after punishment to woman who refused to face trans opponent
item.description: The Trump administration's new Title IX investigations team will be probing an incident when a women's fencer was punished for protesting a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Capitals are the top team in the East after getting Alex Ovechkin the NHL career goals record
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Getting Alex Ovechkin the NHL goals record was a major motivator for the Washington Capitals over the past month. That came Sunday when he scored the 895th of his career. The other aim was locking up the top seed in the Eastern Conference for the fast-approaching playoffs.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Philly's favorite boxer 'Boots' Ennis is bringing a big-time bout back to Atlantic City
item.description: ATLANTIC CITY, N.J. (AP) — Jaron Ennis noted one of his all-time favorite fights was the night Floyd Mayweather Jr. absolutely destroyed Arturo Gatti in a 2005 clash at Atlantic City’s Boardwalk Hall.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers look to keep home win streak going, host the Cubs
item.description: Chicago Cubs (9-6, first in the NL Central) vs. Los Angeles Dodgers (10-4, third in the NL West) Los Angeles; Friday, 10:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Joe Flacco is returning to the Cleveland Browns on a 1-year deal
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Joe Flacco is heading back to Cleveland. The veteran NFL quarterback agreed to terms with the Browns on a one-year deal on Friday. Flacco will have a base salary of $4 million but can earn more with incentives.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caitlin Clark and the Fever vs. Angel Reese and the Sky will tip off new WNBA Rivals Week in August
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will face Angel Reese and the Chicago Sky in prime time to tip off the inaugural WNBA Rivals Week in August. Other games will include two between New York and Minnesota in a WNBA Finals rematch; a matchup of projected No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Morant changes 3-point celebration to pretend grenade toss in light of league fines and warnings
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Ja Morant got in trouble again for aiming an imaginary gun to celebrate 3-pointers, so he has gone to a different make-believe violent way to mark a long-distance shot.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hughes, Eiserman score 2nd-period goals in Boston U's 3-1 Frozen 4 semifinal win over Penn State
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Jack Hughes and Cole Eiserman scored second-period goals and Boston University beat Penn State 3-1 on Thursday night to advance to its first Frozen Four final in 10 years.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah falls in shootout in home finale, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the final game at the Delta Center in their inaugural season, the Utah Hockey Club lost a thriller in a shootout to the Nashville Predators Thursday night, 4-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Venezuelan NWSL star opts out of national team duty fearing possible return issues
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Portland Thorns forward Deyna Castellanos says she did not play for Venezuela's national team in a pair of recent games because of concerns she might not be able to return to the United States.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida's Walter Clayton Jr. recalls final Houston play in title game, admits surprise Cougars didn't get shot
item.description: Florida Gators star Walter Clayton Jr. admitted he was surprised Houston never got a shot off during its final possession of the title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Masters whiz kid: Jose Luis Ballester takes a different kind of relief and does No. 1 at No. 13
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — U.S. Amateur champion Jose Luis Ballester had to take a different kind of relief Thursday at the Masters, just not the kind found in the Rules of Golf.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fred Couples shoots 71 at the Masters. So much for the 65-year-old thinking he no longer belongs
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Fred Couples was so unflappable during the first round of the Masters that not even a sound engineer for one of the broadcasts who wandered down the middle of the fairway as the 1992 champion was trying to tee off threw him out of sync.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
